3207400.name: Silent Still
3207400.description:
Silent Still is a first-person psychological horror game about sleep paralysis and nightmares. In this game, you will experience the terrifying effects of the true horror it can bring. Immerse yourself in the game's realistic visuals to feel the actual experience.

This experience is based on a true story, with some additional elements and creative freedom added for gameplay purposes.

The game immerses players in what people who have experienced sleep paralysis actually go through and shows how terrifying it truly is.

Different Types Of Scenario:

The experience consists of 3 chapters, each with a different type of sleep paralysis scenario. As you progress, you'll also uncover the mystery and secrets of the protagonist hidden within each episode.

Gameplay: 40 - 60 minutes only

Game Features:

  • Photorealistic Graphics
  • High Quality 3D audio
  • Deep Atmosphere
  • Intriguing Story
  • Realistic Gameplay
